title: Responsive Card Grid

statement.markdown: Create a responsive card grid that adapts to different screen sizes. The grid should have a maximum of 3 columns on large screens, 2 columns on medium screens, and 1 column on small screens. The card width should be equal to 1/3, 1/2, or 1/1 of the available space.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling
Each row should contain a maximum of 3 cards
The card height should not exceed 20rem (320px) on large screens
The grid should have a maximum height of 50rem (800px) on large screens
Each card should have a minimum width of 10rem (160px)
Each card should have a margin of 2rem (32px)

gradingCriteria.description: The grid has more than 1 column on large screens
The grid has more than 1 column on medium screens
The grid has more than 1 column on small screens
Each row has a maximum of 3 cards
The card width is equal to 1/3, 1/2, or 1/1 of the available space
